CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. This formula shows the Seller's Gain divided by the Buyer's Total Investment at Closing. If the Buyer's Total Investment at Closing is zero, it substitutes a value of $1 in its place.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This formula shows the Seller's Gain divided by the Buyer's Total Investment at Closing. If the Buyer's Total Investment at Closing is zero, it substitutes a value of $1 in its place.
CustomField.label: Seller's Nominal Rate of Return
